programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Grandfather tells Pingu about the moon and he desperately wants to visit. With Pinga's help, Pingu makes a rocket from a barrel, some tin foil and snow.

programme.title: Pingu
programme.desc: Pingu is a cheeky, charming penguin who finds himself in comical situations in his snowy world!

programme.title: Nerds and Monsters
programme.desc: A group of nerdy kids are washed up on an island inhabited by a tribe of hideous monsters.

programme.title: Zo Zo Zombie
programme.desc: Zo Zo Zombie is our undead hero who, with his best (human) friend Isamu, is just trying to do some good in this world but somehow always ends up in pieces. Literally.

programme.title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: On the planet Eternia, a young prince gains the ability to become a powerful warrior to defend Castle Grayskull against the dark lord Skeletor.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Cat-astrophic comedy capers with the wise-cracking, nap-taking and lasagne-loving cat Garfield.

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: When Polly inherits a magic locket that allows her to shrink to four inches tall, she embraces her pocket-sized powers and finds the upside of shrinking is big fun!

programme.title: Little Angel: Morning Routine Before School / I Like School / Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: Baby John has to decide what to put on first in his busy morning routine. / Baby John is ready for his first day of school. / Baby John, Jack, and Jill have fun making lemonade for their lemonade stand.

programme.title: Lucas The Spider: Lonesome Lucas / I Can't See You
programme.desc: Lucas wakes up in the middle of the night. How long can a night alone last? / Lucas tries to beat Bodhi at Hide and Seek.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane: The Story of Esmeralda the Snake
programme.desc: A neat & tidy snake regrets her kind offer of a shared burrow when Herbert the Warthog moves in. Disaster strikes and they are both made homeless. Only then do they appreciate what they had together.

programme.title: HeyKids: Three Little Pigs / The Ugly Duckling
programme.desc: The Three Little Pigs cartoon is based on an European fairy tale about three little pigs who built three houses and lived happily... until a Big Bad Wolf appeared.

programme.title: The Hoobs: Hello
programme.desc: Groove thinks there can't be a better way of saying hello than giving his tail a good old wagga-wagga - but how do the Tiddlypeeps say hello?

programme.title: Badanamu Cadets: The Snow Ecco Surprise
programme.desc: The Cadets are in the middle of a seal-saving operation when they are attacked by the Snow Ecco. Turns out, it is being controlled by none other than Esme. The Cadets must put their heads together to stop Esme and her evil plan.

programme.title: Badanamu Stories: Mimi's Color Secret
programme.desc: Bada wants to climb a tree, Abby wants to go to the pumpkin patch, and Mipi wants to pick grapes. However, they can't go out in the storm, so Mimi comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Sing Along With Tobee: Hello Hello / One Little Finger / Skidamarink
programme.desc: Welcome to Sing Along With Tobee! In this very first episode, Tobee and Caitie teach you a super simple hello song! Join them each episode as they sing and dance to classic nursery rhymes and kids songs. / Caitie and Tobee sing one of their favorite kids songs, One Little Finger. It's super simple and super fun. It's also great for learning new parts of the body vocabulary! / Tobee makes a card for his dad's birthday but he wants to give him something else. So Caitie teaches him Skidamarink, the perfect song to sing on a birthday, Valentine's Day, Father's Day, Mother's Day, or any other day you'd like to tell someone how special they are!

programme.title: Mr. Mender and the Chummyjiggers: Thank You Scribblies
programme.desc: The Chummies learn how to say thank you to the scribblies.

programme.title: Chaotic: Chasm Quest
programme.desc: A ferocious force is unleashed in the Prexxor Chasm, threatening Tom and all the chasm's creatures.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Sidewalk Art
programme.desc: While drawing with Chalk, Pinkalicious begins to tell her friends an epic story about Puddles the poodle and Splish-Splash the cat.

programme.title: Road Rangers: Ambulance Donna is Here / Frank-In-Style
programme.desc: Road Rangers are a group of super heroes comprising of five street vehicles a police car, fire truck, ambulance, tow truck and garbage truck that fight crime and strive hard to keep their city safe! Call Donna, the cutest cartoon ambulance, if you've hurt yourself and she will be there in a jiffy to save the day. Sing and dance along to this car cartoon song just about Donna! / Frank is back with this funny silly antics in trying to become something that he is not! Watch as he learns all about self-confidence and learning to love oneself as you are in this fun filled kids episode with his friends tractor, ambulance, car, bike, fire engine, monster truck, garbage truck, loader, excavator, dumper, digger, tow truck, crane, helicopter and more.

programme.title: Caitie's Classroom: Wonderful Wind
programme.desc: Whoosh! Wind is an amazing kind of weather and we have lots of things to explore! Join Caitie in the classroom to experiment with a wind tunnel and see what toys we can blow away using wind. The wind can be used for all kinds of things, like making strange-shaped monsters with paint, and for making electricity on the wind farm we visit on our field trip. It's a windy day inside the classroom!

programme.title: Cry Babies Magic Tears: The Pear Monster / The Little Worm
programme.desc: Ella is this month's Best Harvester and to celebrate she invites all of her friends for a super smoothie. All the Cry Babies are on their way to the beach when Ella, along with Nana, take several smoothies and piles them in her arms, but... when she tries to walk, loses balance and all the smoothies fall on her! One hits her in the eye leaving a smoothie-shaped bruise. When the other Cry Babies arrive to the beach, they ask what has happened to her eye. Ella gets nervous and starts lying telling the story of how the Pear Monster has tried to attack her but she knew how to scare it. Will the rest of the Cry Babies believe this story or maybe someone might have witnessed what really happened? Don't miss this new episode of Cry Babies in English and find out the end of this magic story! / The Cry Babies Tutti Frutti's are collecting apples when, suddenly, they find a worm in one of them. The babies want the worm to leave the piece of fruit, but it hypnotises Angie and makes her believe that she now has to live in the apple. The other Cry Babies have no idea what is going on: Angie's behaviour is really strange and she is always together with the worm. When the other Cry Babies realise the worm is hypnotising their friend, Angie explains that the family of Gusi, the worm, need a home. Will the Cry Babies help Angie and her new friend the worm? Don't miss this new episode of Cry Babies in English and find out the end of this magic story!

programme.title: Orange Moo-Cow: Happy Moo Year / To The North Pole
programme.desc: The Cow family prepares for New Year celebration and Granny's and Grandpa's arrival. / It's winter time. In their country house Boh and Zoh get a postcard from their Granny and Grandpa from the North Pole. Boh gets an idea to have an expedition to the North Pole. He gets ready for it – he exercises, runs cross country.

programme.title: Science Max: Earthquake-Proof
programme.desc: Phil tries to build a tower strong enough to not fall apart when shaken in a massive earthquake.

programme.title: Happy Camper Live: 365 Days of Camp
programme.desc: Hey Happy Campers! Today at Happy Camper Live, we are having a blast making memories! Paint your own camp memory box, learn theatre styles, top rock B-Boy dance moves and Salt Shaker Magic! What are y

programme.title: Happy Camper Live: 365 Days of Camp
programme.desc: Hey Happy Campers! Today at Happy Camper Live, we are getting crafty with Tooth Pillows, learning Breathing Techniques for Singing, making Grilled Queso Mexican Style, and discovering the Magic Indica

programme.title: Kidibli: Living in a fortified Castle!
programme.desc: Today Kidi takes you to the fortified castle of Guédelon to find out how the kings and queens of the Middle Ages lived! He will paint and talk to the castle workers. Let's go back in time!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: LankyBox
programme.desc: LankyBox is Roblox superstars Justin and Adam, two best friends who love playing popular video games!

programme.title: Mackenzie Turner Roblox
programme.desc: Roblox fanatic Mackenzie Turner is known for her comedic and exuberant Brookhaven and Adopt Me videos!

programme.title: Denis
programme.desc: Meet Denis, the gaming superstar who takes on obbys – and builds his own – within Roblox and Minecraft!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Onyx Family
programme.desc: Onyx Family is best known for their spooky skits, starring the Onyx Kids: Shiloh, Shasha, Sinead, and Shalom.

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: Whip It
programme.desc: WHIP IT, the directorial debut of Drew Barrymore, stars Elliot Page as Bliss, a rebellious Texan teen who throws in her small town beauty pageant crown for the rowdy world of roller-derby. Marcia Gay Harden plays Bliss' disapproving mother, while Kristen Wiig and Juliette Lewis play roller-derby stars. Also starring Eve, Jimmy Fallon and Daniel Stern.

programme.title: Mad Families
programme.desc: Focuses on three families – one Hispanic, one African American, one Caucasian – who find themselves sharing the same camping space on a Fourth of July holiday weekend. When none of them volunteer to vacate the site, they decide on a series of competitions to determine a winner.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.title: North
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old North (Elijah Wood, The Lord of the Rings trilogy) realizes that his parents (Jason Alexander and Julia Louis-Dreyfus, TV's “Seinfeld”) never pay attention to him. After talking to a wise man in an Easter Bunny suit (Bruce Willis, Die Hard), North comes up with the idea of becoming a free agent. After winning a court case, North is given two months to find new parents, leading to an amazing, hilarious adventure. Featuring an all-star cast including Dan Aykroyd, Alan Arkin, Kathy Bates, Jon Lovitz, John Ritter and, in her first-ever role, Scarlett Johansson, NORTH is a comedy unlike any other.

programme.title: The Robot Giant
programme.desc: A great war has just finished and the dust is settling across a vast wasteland when a giant robot, finds himself wandering, lost and alone. Luckily, he stumbles into a tiny, hapless robot who has lost his memory and is now stuck with his new companion. Together, the pair decide to journey across the desert in search of Ram, the creator of all robots, to learn more about themselves. Along the way, the pair quickly become close friends as an array of adventures and mishaps teach them that where you belong is wherever you are happiest and that to learn who you are, you just need to listen to your heart. A fun, lively and heart-warming adventure, The Robot Giant is a vibrant animation perfect for all family!

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target. A young man (Chris Evans - Sunshine, Fantastic Four ) and a teenage girl with extraordinary gifts (Dakota Fanning - War of the Worlds) take on a clandestine agency in a battle they can win only if they change the future.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history. Based on the novel by the author of War Horse, Waiting for Anya follows the story of Jo Lalande, a thirteen-year-old shepherd living in the mountain village of Lescun. Though Europe may be ravaged by the horrors of World War II, Jo's world in the French Pyrenees has remained remarkably untouched. That is, until a ferocious encounter with a bear introduces Jo to the mysterious Benjamin, a Jewish refugee who is desperately awaiting the arrival of his missing daughter, Anya, before making his escape across the border. Making friends with Benjamin and his mother-in-law Horcada, an isolated widow who lives in the nearby mountains, Jo becomes aware of a very dangerous secret - the family are involved in smuggling Jewish children over the mountains to the safety of Spain. In a heroic act of defiance, Jo promises to assist Benjamin in his endeavours...but soon becomes embroiled in a perilous conspiracy when German troops make their descent upon the village. Filmed in the village of Lescun and the surrounding Aspe Valley, France in which the true to life story also originated, the film boasts an all-stellar cast including Noah Schnapp (Stranger Things), Academy Award Winner Anjelica Huston (Ever After, The Addams Family), Jean Reno (Leon, The Big Blue, Ronin), Frederick Schmidt (Mission: Impossible - Fallout), Thomas Kretschmann (The Pianist, Central Intelligence) and Nicholas Rowe (Riviera, Lock Stock and Two Smoking Barrels).

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: Bound And Babysitting
programme.desc: Forced to baby-sit with her college nemesis, a young woman starts to see the man in a new light.

programme.title: Elle A Modern Cinderella Tale
programme.desc: Elle wants to be a singer/songwriter, but her dreams are cut short by the sudden death of her parents. She moves in with her adoptive uncle, who runs a small independent record label whose biggest act, Sensation, is also Elle's biggest pain. The pop music environment at the label, very different than the country roots she is used to, adds to Elle's feelings of loss and frustration, and her misplaced guilt, which is caused by the fact that her parents had been en route to her performance at the time of her death. But when she meets Ty Parker, a famous pop singer with a passion for "real" music, her repressed ambition is released through a revitalized interest in singing and songwriting.

programme.title: Hope Dances
programme.desc: Hope Douglas has a dream but her parents have thrown her into battle between playing sports and dancing ballet. When a tragedy strikes, Hope has to make a difficult choice that will decide her fate - which way does she go?

programme.title: Smother
programme.desc: After being fired from his job, an everyday guy faces pressure from his wife about having a baby, while having to deal with his suffocating mother, who has decided to move in with the couple.

programme.title: The Assassin Next Door
programme.desc: A woman forced to work as an assassin for the Russian mafia agrees to help her neighbor kill her abusive husband.

programme.title: Lost in Love
programme.desc: Two tourists in Turkey get left behind by their tour bus after visiting an archaeological site. Without their belongings, they must make their way back to Istanbul, improvising along the way with meager means.

programme.title: Finding Love in Big Sky
programme.desc: An independent country girl, Paisley, takes on the task of upholding her adored grandfather's ranch. After being denied the funding needed to refurbish the ranch, she is reintroduced to her ex-boyfriend Josh, a big-time marketing executive stationed in Denver who has been suspended from his current position at his company. Admitting to herself that she needs the help, Paisley agrees to work with Josh while he is town to come up with ideas on how to raise money for the farm.

programme.title: Hope Ranch
programme.desc: A young girl has it all—a beautiful ranch, a horse named Faith, and the love of her family. But after the death of her military father, she and her mother are in danger of losing their family ranch too. With a little help from friends and their majestic white horse, they hatch a plan to raise enough money to save the ranch while learning to never lose hope, despite all odds.

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Gunsight Ridge
programme.desc: Stage line agent investigates a series of robberies by taking the job of a deputy sheriff in a border Arizona town.

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You Trinity!
programme.desc: Trinity is an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family that he abandoned years earlier. Unfortunately for him, a ruthless bounty hunter is on his trail.

programme.title: Hour of Death
programme.desc: Bob Carey, fresh out of jail, goes in search of his fiancée and soon learns that she has married a wealthy farmer.

programme.title: Day of Anger
programme.desc: Bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials, not the usual James gang.

programme.title: Two Brothers in Trinity
programme.desc: After inheriting a land plot in a dusty place called Trinity, the antagonistic half-brothers, Lester and Jesse, reunite to pursue different aspirations, only to find themselves neck-deep in trouble. Will they ever fulfil their dreams?

programme.title: Bride To Be
programme.desc: What if pain was merely a set up for the ultimate surprise party? Genie Burns, owner of Surprise Enterprise, masterminds surprise parties in nobody would-suspect-it locations. Here she takes crazy risks but in her love life, she plays it safe.

programme.title: Cinderella Pact
programme.desc: Nola, Deb, and Nancy are best friends who create a Cinderella Pact—a weight loss agreement using advice from "fairy godmother" newspaper columnist Bel.

programme.title: Wicker Park
programme.desc: A young Chicago advertising executive believes a woman he sees in a café is his long-lost love. His belief leads to obsession, as he puts his life on hold in order to trail her. Starring: Josh Hartnett, Diane Kruger, Matthew Lillard, Rose Byrne

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: Onegin
programme.desc: Russia, 1820s: Onegin inherits his uncle's country estate and moves there from St. Petersburg. He befriends his neighbor, Lensky, and meets Tatyana through him. She falls in love with Onegin but he just wants friendship.

programme.title: Arctic Blast
programme.desc: When a solar eclipse sends a colossal blast of super chilled air towards the earth, it then sets off a catastrophic chain of events that threatens to engulf the world in ice and begin a new Ice Age.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: On August 15, 1944 the 517th Parachute Regimental Combat Team (PRCT) jumped over the south of France. Their mission was to support and protect the Allied Troops marching to Berlin. Landing in enemy territory, they fell under immediate attack. In their effort to complete the mission and rendez-vous with their unit, three isolated paratroopers come across a group of French resistants in desperate need. They decide to help liberate some of the captive Partisans. Doing so they will risk their lives.

programme.title: A Random Encounter
programme.desc: This whirlwind rom-com proves that finding Prince Charming can be a right royal pain. Sassy Mindy is well and truly immersed in the superficial dating scene, while her best friend Laura is a hopeless romantic. So when she has a chance moment with a stranger in a coffee shop, she is left wondering whether this could blossom into a lifelong romance?

programme.title: The Frontiersmen
programme.desc: A pretty and gentle schoolteacher from Boston transforms the lives of a spoiled boy and the other residents at 'Bar 20' Ranch, and is courted by Crockett city's Mayor, who is really a livestock thief.

programme.title: The General
programme.desc: Rejected by the Confederate army and taken for a coward by his beloved Annabelle Lee (Marion Mack), young Johnny Gray (Keaton) is given a chance to redeem himself when Yankee spies steal his cherished locomotive. Johnny wages a one-man war against hijacke

programme.title: The Ghost Of Sierra De Cobre
programme.desc: Terrified of being buried alive by mistake, a woman puts a phone in her crypt to be able to call home if she needs help. She dies and nothing happens. One day, the phone suddenly rings. Paranormal investigator Nelson Orion (Martin Landau) is brought in.

programme.title: The Gold Rush
programme.desc: A prospector goes to the Klondike in search of gold and finds it and more.

programme.title: The Idiot
programme.desc: A Japanese veteran, driven partially mad from the war, travels to the snowy island of Kameda where he soon enters a love triangle with his best friend and a disgraced woman.

programme.title: Bigger
programme.desc: A rags-to-riches biopic of visionary Joe Weider, set in the world of fitness. Brothers Joe & Ben Weider were the architects of muscle.

programme.title: Time of the Wolf
programme.desc: After the death of his parents, Aaron has to live on the remote ranch of his distant aunt and uncle. Uncommunicative relatives and the cruelty he suffers from at his new school let him turn to a friendship with a wolf cub orphaned by local farmers.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Nobel Son
programme.desc: On the eve of Barkley Michaelson's father receiving the Nobel Prize, Barkley is kidnapped and the requested ransom is the $2,000,000 in Nobel Prize money.

programme.title: My Zoe
programme.desc: Prepare for one of the most emotionally-engaging film of the year. My Zoe is a heartbreaking family drama with a dystopian science fiction twist starring Julie Delpy (Before Sunrise), Richard Armitage (The Hobbit franchise, The Stranger), Gemma Arterton (Summerland) and Daniel Brühl (Captain America: Civil War). Isabelle (Julie Delpy) is a divorcee recovering from a toxic marriage but still forced into contact with her ex (Richard Armitage) because they are co-parenting their daughter Zoe. When tragedy strikes this fractured family, Isabelle - a top-level scientist - takes matters into her own hands an unexpected and shocking way."

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time. Will Salas lives minute-to-minute, until a windfall of time gives him access to the world of the wealthy, where he teams up with a beautiful young heiress to destroy the corrupt system.

programme.title: Invasion Planet Earth
programme.desc: After the death of his young daughter, Tom Dunn is a broken man. When his wife falls pregnant again, he cannot believe their luck. However, his joy is short-lived, as, on the very same day, the people of Earth become plagued with terrifying visions of the end of the world. When a gigantic, all-consuming alien mothership appears in the sky and launches a ruthless attack on Earth's cities, chaos and destruction follow. Tom must find the strength and wisdom to save his wife and unborn child. However, first he must confront a shocking truth. A truth which threatens the key to the survival of the human race. The ultimate war for Planet Earth is about to begin...

programme.title: His Secret Past
programme.desc: Popular crime novelist, Jennifer Becker lives a lavish life in a small coastal town in California with her daughter, Lily. One day, while out for a run, Lily is attacked--but then rescued by a mysterious stranger named Mick.

programme.title: Offline
programme.desc: An online stalker torments a young woman.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: A girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) takes her brother (Tyler Humphrey) and dog on an adventure after an angel grants her three wishes.

programme.title: Baby Bootcamp
programme.desc: Fitness instructor Julia is down on her luck, trying to make her baby boot camp a thriving business. To make ends meet, she becomes a part-time nanny for a single widowed father. Trouble is, she knows nothing about taking care of children.

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: Young divorce lawyer Kelsey finds it safer to keep love out of her life - that is until a stray dog pairs her with Harrison, the local vet.

programme.title: Down With Love
programme.desc: Barbara Novak hits New York City with her new book Down With Love, a feminist manifesto on saying “no” to love and “yes” to career, empowerment...and sex. As Barbara's revolutionary tome rockets to the top of best-seller charts, she becomes the target of ace journalist Catcher “Catch” Block, ladies' man/man's man/man-about-town, who is determined to take her down.

programme.title: 5 Weddings
programme.desc: A journalist writing a story on Punjabi weddings falls in love with her liaison officer who is trying to keep her story censored amidst a colorful mosaic of transgender dancers and cultural clashes.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby
programme.desc: This beautifully honest portrait of love follows the once happily married couple Conor (James McAvoy of X-MEN FRANCHISE, ATONEMENT) and Eleanor (Academy Award®-nominee Jessica Chastain of ZERO DARK THIRTY, THE TREE OF LIFE). After being torn apart by tragedy, the couple find themselves strangers longing to reclaim the passion and life they once shared. This ensemble romance costars Academy Award®-nominee Viola Davis (THE HELP, TV's HOW TO GET AWAY WITH MURDER), Bill Hader (TV's SATURDAY NIGHT LIVE), Academy Award®-winner William Hurt (A HISTORY OF VIOLENCE), and Isabelle Huppert (AMOUR).

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Kelly is a young, creative, ambitious events planner in New York City and quickly gaining a reputation as one of the best in the business. But when Joe, a stubborn, difficult, but influential website editor, hires her to organize his niece's 10th birthday party, Kelly quickly realizes that she may have just met her match.

programme.title: Major Movie Star
programme.desc: Movie star Megan Valentine loses everything when her sleazy boyfriend embezzles all her wealth.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: Anne deals with life as a working mother and raising a teen who seems to be growing up faster than expected.

programme.title: Ride Like a Girl
programme.desc: The story of Michelle Payne, the first female jockey to win the Melbourne Cup.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Starring Morgan Freeman and John Cusack comes a twisty, slick and intelligent crime thriller full of action, suspense mystery and intrigue. Cusack plays Ray Keene, a father who, during a hiking trip with his son in the wilderness, is suddenly forced into a dangerous rescue mission when a notorious assassin, Frank Cordell, washes downriver handcuffed to a dying US Marshall.

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken
programme.desc: A tense psychological thriller and heist movie, starring Jim Sturgess (Cloud Atlas), Sam Worthington (Avatar) and Anthony Hopkins (Thor: The Dark World). Turned down for a bank loan, low-level career criminals embark upon one of the most infamous crimes in recent history, the kidnapping of Freddy Heineken (Hopkins), heir to the brewing empire and one of the wealthiest men in the Netherlands.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: Starring Oscar Winner Mel Gibson and from the team behind Hacksaw Ridge and Pearl Harbor. In 1965, 400 American troops faced an ambush by 2,000 enemy troops in the Ia Drang Valley (also known as the Valley of Death), in one of the most gruesome fights of the Vietnam War. We Were Soldiers is a powerful, moving and lasting tribute to the heart-breaking sacrifices of those fallen soldiers.

programme.title: Deadly BandB
programme.desc: A woman opens her dream bed-and-breakfast in a recently restored home, but the arrival of a dangerous guest quickly disturbs the peace. Stars Angie Patterson Muto and Chad Michael Collins (2018)

programme.title: Killer Cove
programme.desc: A woman begins a relationship with the detective she's hired to deal with her stalker. Unbeknownst to her the detective is her deadly avenging angel. Starring Cathy Baron (2019)

programme.title: Shattered Memories
programme.desc: After waking up next to the body of her former lover, a woman must track down the real killer. Starring Elizabeth Bogush (2018)

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective
programme.desc: After a shocking murder at his friend's restaurant, a culinary expert uses his mastery of food, drink and cooking to solve the case. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2015)

programme.title: Our Take on Love
programme.desc: Designer Isabella and filmmaker Blake are both hired to work at the Godfrey Manor Gala. Will the romantic location and the love stories they uncover change their perception of love for the better?

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Recently single Gwen helps to plan her best friend's wedding. But finalising the final details are complicated when she is teamed-up with laid back best man, Josh. Stars Andrea Brooks. (2021)

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Courtney is a talented chef who has taken over the running of the family restaurant. But is her renewed zest for life and her newfound passion for cooking linked to Jake returning home? (2021)

programme.title: Sunrise in Heaven [aka Forever Love]
programme.desc: A true story that spans over four decades between Jan and young G.I Steve, navigating family, faith, and love. You will be in for a roller-coaster of emotions. (2019)

programme.title: Guess Who
programme.desc: Percy Jones (BERNIE MAC) takes great pride in the knowledge that he is always right, especially when it comes to the welfare of his family. When his daughter Theresa (ZOË SALDAÑA) brings her new boyfriend, Simon Green (ASHTON KUTCHER), home to meet Percy and his wife Marilyn (JUDITH SCOTT), he is unaware that Simon has already proposed to Theresa and plans to announce the engagement at Percy and Marilyn's 25th anniversary party.

programme.title: A Kid Like Jake
programme.desc: Alex Wheeler (CLAIRE DANES) and her husband Greg (JIM PARSONS) are approaching a crossroads that is all too familiar to New York City parents - finding the ""right"" primary school for their son, Jake. Greg is a therapist working to build a private practice, while Alex has put a law career on hold to devote herself full-time to raising her son, a precocious four-year-old who happens to prefer Disney princesses to G.I. Joe. Aware that Jake has the potential to be a candidate for a scholarship at a private school, Jake's preschool director Judy (OCTAVIA SPENCER), a trusted friend of the family, encourages Alex to mention Jake's ""gender expansive"" play in their applications.

programme.title: Life at These Speeds
programme.desc: We all have those memories. Indelible, perfect memories that make you glow with happiness. Like the way the sun shone off her hair the morning you met her or the sound of your best friend's laughter after an inside joke or your coach's inspiring speech or daydreaming with the love of your life about your future together. After a teenager's friends are killed in an accident, he finds running allows him to remember them perfectly. Running however also brings him notoriety. Soon he finds himself caught between keeping the past alive and making new memories in the present.

programme.title: The Crossing
programme.desc: Based on the historical novel by Howard Fast, THE CROSSING stars Jeff Daniels as George Washington, the revolutionary war general who leads American colonialists in the war against British rule. This telefilm dramatizes Washington's crossing of the Delaware River in 1776, prior to his eventual election as the first president of the United States.

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: A divorced father and his eight-year-old son, spend a rather predictable weekend together, but when a valuable toolbox gets stolen, the search for the thieves will turn into a true family bonding.

programme.title: White Water Summer
programme.desc: A group of city boys go on a camping trip with a counselor whose enthusiasm borders on the psychotic.

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A cop of the future, an evil genius and a murderous robotic force in a deadly chase of runaway terror.

programme.title: Berry Gordy's The Last Dragon
programme.desc: An enjoyable pastiche of martial arts, romance, music, and video, THE LAST DRAGON presents a likable young hero, Leroy (Taimak), who aspires to become a kung fu master. Trouble arises in the form of a huge man who calls himself "Sho' Nuff, who is determined to prove himself the kung fu master of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Enough
programme.desc: An abused wife on the run from her violent husband finally decides she's had enough.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A reincarnated soul (Robert Downey, Jr.) falls in love with his widow (Cybill Shepherd) 25 years after his death.

programme.title: Saving Silverman
programme.desc: Two friends try anything to keep their buddy and bandmate from marrying the wrong woman.

programme.title: Joe Dirt
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plucky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: When a couple of lazy hunter-gatherers (Black and Cera) are banished from their primitive village, they set off on an epic journey through the ancient world.

programme.title: The Boy in the Plastic Bubble
programme.desc: Loving parents Johnny (Robert Reed, TV's “The Brady Bunch”) and Mickey Lubitch (Diana Hyland, TV's “Peyton Place”) learn that their son, Tod (Travolta), is born with an immune deficiency. Forced to live in a self-contained environment, he is unable to have direct contact with anything or anyone in the outside world. Despite being sheltered from society, Tod remains optimistic about life, even developing a relationship with his neighbor, Gina (Glynnis O'Connor, Johnny Dangerously). But all Tod hopes for is to get outside and experience what others take for granted.

programme.title: Just a Gigolo
programme.desc: Paul von Przygodski, a young Prussian gentleman, arrives in the trenches in time to be caught in the final explosion of the Great War. After recuperating in a military hospital, where he is mistaken for a French hero, he returns to Berlin. His family home has been turned into a boarding house, his father is paralyzed, and his mother is working in the Turkish baths. Attempting to find a new purpose, his childhood friend, Cilly, abandons him for fame and fortune his former commanding officer, Captain Kraft, tries to persuade him to join his right-wing movement and a widow, Helga von Kaiserling, briefly seduces him with the finer things in life.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: "The Match" tells the story of the true events which transpired in the spring of 1944 when Nazis organized a football match between the Hungarian prisoners and an elite Nazi team to commemorate Adolf Hitler's birthday.

programme.title: Feed
programme.desc: Olivia and Matthew Grey, 18-year-old twins born into a world of privilege and high expectations. There are almost no boundaries between them even their dreams are connected.

programme.title: The Double
programme.desc: When a US senator turns up dead with his throat slit, retired CIA operative Paul Shepherdson (Richard Gere) is sure it bears the mark of infamous Soviet assassin Cassius. The only problem is that Cassius was thought to have been killed years ago. Forced back into service, Paul is teamed with a hotshot FBI agent Ben Geary (Topher Grace) who believes that Cassius has been active all this time. As the pair get closer to the shocking truth, Shepherdson is forced to re-examine everything he thought he knew, in this edge of your seat espionage thriller.

programme.title: Saints & Soliders: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: On August 15th 1944, the 517th Parachute Regimental Combat Team (PRCT) jumped over the south of France. In their effort to complete the mission and rendezvous with their unit, three isolated paratroopers come across a group of French resistants in desperate need. They decide to help liberate some of the captive partisans but in doing so they risk their lives. They are the Airborne Creed.

programme.title: 500 MPH Storm
programme.desc: At 500 MPH disaster is inevitable. When an experiment goes disastrously wrong, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: France is in turmoil and a new, naive King finds himself manipulated by the evil Cardinal Richelieu (James Cosmo, Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan). With a corrupt commander of the royal guard by his side the Cardinal employs the expertise of the devious and wicked Milady de Winter in a plot to bring down the monarchy and drag the country into war. As France burns the Cardinal will take control. All that stands between them and victory are the remnants of an elite group who wore loyalty to crown and country.

programme.desc: It is a land of extremes - tallest, deepest, highest, hottest - and home to the richest concentration of biodiversity in the Americas. California sea lions pursue king salmon down the California Current and into their freshwater spawning grounds. Mountain lions stalk majestic bighorn sheep into the forbidding reaches of the Sierra Nevada and its vital snow-packs, and giant redwoods harvest precious water right out of the air. In a rapidly changing - and thirsty - world, drought, dams and fire pose dire threats to a vibrant ecosystem connected by rivers on land, in the sky and in the sea.

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In 'Dinosaurs Of The Deep' we accompany a team of WildOceans' scientists uncovering the mysteries behind the deep oceans. With only 32 individuals known to exist off the coast of South Africa, central to the storytelling will be the quest to discover the 33rd coelacanth.

programme.title: Marine Mammals
programme.desc: From giant sperm whales to dramatic humpbacks and playful dolphins, we can't resist the endless charms of marine mammals.

programme.title: Dreams of the Settlers
programme.sub-title: An American Journey: Through Louisiana Along the Mississippi
programme.desc: The vast Delta of the Mississippi River is the gateway to the South of the United States. It always has been. This is where our journey begins: through Louisiana along the banks of the mighty river, to the big inland city of New Orleans, founded long ago by the French. Further inland, sugarcane plantations and the villas of their former owners stretch as far as the eye can see. To the north, we leave the river and, taking spectacular roads, we pass through the swamplands of the Mississippi, which were once impenetrable, serving as the ideal hideout for many a runaway. Bordering Texas, where the swamplands end, is the beginning of the vast cattle country. This is home to the last remaining cowboys in the United States who, still today, maintain their French cultural heritage.

programme.title: The Gulf of Naples
programme.desc: The myth of the sirens is still alive in the Gulf of Naples. According to the legend, the singing mermaids wrought their havoc here. No sailor could resist their singing blinded by lust, they would steer their ships onto the rocks and sink. Only Odysseus was able to outwit the seductive sirens. On walks along the Gulf of Naples, the film encounters countless witnesses of the seductive power of this arguably most beautiful of Italian coastlines: on the islands of Capri and Ischia, but above all in Naples itself – the great port city at the foot of Vesuvius. After all, the city traces its very founding back to the legend of the sirens: the first settlement bore the name of one of the sirens – Parthenope.

programme.title: Spectacular wildlife in the forests around the globe
programme.desc: A forest is like an organism, ancient and full of complex mechanics at work. Its plants need water and a specific range of temperature. And still, it can be found in the most variable places of the world. But how does it manage to adapt to the most adverse condition and still thrive? “Forests of this earth” uncovers the forest's amazing strategies of survival, the strange phenomena that allow them to strive in varied biotopes and under different environmental conditions, and the interplay they have with the fascinating animals living in them.

programme.title: Northern Woods
programme.desc: It is a musical film a a tributeto the Nordic forest: it shows its development from a primeval wood to a cultivated forest. Once populated by wild animals such as wolves, bears, eagles, deer and musk oxen, complex re-enactment-scenes shot by dollies and helicopters vividly depict the colonization of the forest by the Celts and Germans. But as time progressed, the northern forest has on numerous occasions fallen victim to environmental degradation and overexploitation. Several provisions were made to protect this wild beauty. The Helsinki resolution of 1993, which stipulated that the woods be used in a way and in a magnitude which guarantees their biological variety and productiveness and vitality, is but one measure put in place to secure the preservation of the natural gem. Time-lapse photography and breath-taking shots show our main protagonist – the woods – in its stunning glory. This beautiful wooded land, changes throughout the seasons. Our woodland is a world-renowned ecological jewel. It is famous, well-known and loved by tourists, forest economists, environmentalists, historians and intellectuals alike.

programme.title: Germany's Mystic Forest
programme.desc: 2.000 rivers and streams dig deep into the underground and transport their water into reservoirs or "Germany's Wild Amazon", the Wupper. These forests and rivers, together with heathlands and moors, are home to a diverse fauna. Martens, badgers, wild boars, hares, roe deer, and red deer, even black grouse and hazel deer find shelter in these parts. Wolves also have a dominant presence, not to mention those who live underground, such as lizards, bats, and snakes. Accompany us on a journey where we explore every corner of this rugged land. Climb underground into the Bergisches Land, through the vast hidden cave systems that sprawl far beneath the forests. There is also much to be discovered in the water, dive with us in crystal clear streams and rivers with their diverse flora and fauna.

programme.title: Fertile Floods
programme.desc: Every year, in the middle of Croatia, it's the same story: after the annual snowmelt, a huge flood wave spills out of the Alps toward Zagreb and Belgrade. This leads to an increase in the River Sava's water levels of some ten metres. The contents of more than ten billion bathtubs floods an area the size of Lake Constance, often for months on end, yet still the Croatian and Serbian capital is spared a flood disaster. One of the reasons for this is the fact that the Sava is able to flow unhindered. The annual floods not only create a natural retention reservoir for flood control: alongside the Sava lies a natural paradise, unique in Central Europe. In the species-rich, alluvial flood forests of the last major meadow landscapes of the continent, enormous predatory fish like the catfish lie in wait for prey. The fertile floodplains of the Sava are an important resting place for more than 240 bird species, including Hoopoe, great crested Grebe, little Egret, common snipe and pied Avocet. Old, domestic livestock breeds like the Turopolje pig and Posavina horse spend almost the entire year in the floodplains. They appreciate the alluvial meadows, keep puddles and mudholes open whilst wallowing and, as living lawnmowers, they ensure that the moist meadows aren't transformed into dense oak forests. Thanks to this traditional pasture farming, more than 700 pairs of white stork alone breed in the Lonjsko Polje National Park. The Sava Floodplains allow us to glance into the past of our continent and at the same time, illustrate just how flood protection for major towns can be perfected.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean.

programme.desc: In this year's edition on The Balkan Peninsula, we have competing the new talent from Estonia Marko Remlik together with Sebastian Kurek from Poland and yellow leader Kelvin de Ruiter
